title: tritonia refracta
intro: Tritonia refracta, also known as the "African trumpet flower," is a plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the Iridaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tritonia refracta include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an expectorant to ease respiratory congestion. Herbal preparations of Tritonia refracta include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
